productDisplayName: Nike Unisex Ap Kids Snl G White Socks
description: Composition White Sports socks made of 77% cotton, 22% nylon and 1% spandex, has moisture-wicking properties with arch support, half-cushion terry foot, and 07 with nike Swoosh printed on the top Fitting Snug Wash care Machine wash warm in cold water at 30 degrees Use non-chlorine bleach if needed Do not use softeners Tumble dry low Do not dry clean or iron Wear these white cushioned nike socks for maximum comfort when you're indulging in sporting activities. With an arch support for a secure, stable Fit, half-cushion terry foot for extra comfort and shock-absorption, and moisture wicking technology for keeping your feet dry and comfortable, they are perfect for all kinds of sports. Wear comfortable shoes with them for best results.
